items.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
items.summary: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided, but it "will not be tomorrow".

items.title: Switzerland to vote on plan to cap population at 10 million
items.summary: The right-wing Swiss People's Party calls the plan a "sustainability initiative",  but opponents say it is a recipe for chaos.

items.title: Nigerian author accuses hospital of stalling review into her son's death
items.summary: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie's 21-month old son died in a Lagos hospital, which she says is trying to stop an inquest into the circumstances of his death.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 南韓網紅看世足賽遭墨西哥人種族歧視 全網震怒肉搜
items.summary: 在YouTube擁有660萬名粉絲的南韓網紅「이노냥 inoCat」，前往墨西哥觀看南韓對陣捷克的世界盃小組賽，孰料過程中卻遭到墨國觀眾種族歧視，隨著影片瘋傳後引發全網震怒肉搜。...…

items.title: 悚！巴西女子高空彈跳墜亡 竟是工作人員未幫她綁安全繩

items.title: 伊朗最高領袖遭炸死逾百日......哈米尼7/9長眠聖地 女兒女婿同日下葬
items.summary: 穆斯林傳統講求死後24小時內下葬，但伊朗前最高領袖哈米尼（Ayatollah Ali Khamenei）身亡已逾百日，國葬日期才終於拍板。伊朗官方宣布，這位掌權近40年的強人將...…
